parameters.query:
SELECT
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ct_users WHERE status = 'active') AS total_usuarios,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ct_users WHERE registered = true AND status = 'active') AS registrados,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM ct_trivia_responses WHERE is_duplicate = FALSE) AS activos,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ct_trivia_responses WHERE is_duplicate = FALSE) AS total_respuestas,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ct_trivia_responses WHERE is_correct = TRUE AND is_duplicate = FALSE) AS correctas,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ct_trivia_responses WHERE is_correct = FALSE AND is_duplicate = FALSE AND is_out_of_time = FALSE) AS incorrectas,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ct_trivia_responses WHERE is_out_of_time = TRUE) AS fuera_de_tiempo,
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_goals), 0) FROM ct_users WHERE status = 'active') AS goles_totales,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ct_trivias WHERE status IN ('sent','closed','settled')) AS trivias_enviadas,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ct_trivias WHERE has_multiplier = TRUE AND status IN ('sent','closed','settled')) AS trivias_con_multiplicador,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ct_users WHERE status = 'active' AND agent_name = 'PRUEBAS') AS pruebas_usuarios,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ct_users WHERE registered = TRUE AND status = 'active' AND agent_name = 'PRUEBAS') AS pruebas_registrados,
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_goals), 0) FROM ct_users WHERE status = 'active' AND agent_name = 'PRUEBAS') AS pruebas_goles,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM ct_trivia_responses WHERE is_duplicate = FALSE AND user_id IN (SELECT user_id FROM ct_users WHERE agent_name = 'PRUEBAS')) AS pruebas_activos,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ct_trivia_responses WHERE is_duplicate = FALSE AND user_id IN (SELECT user_id FROM ct_users WHERE agent_name = 'PRUEBAS')) AS pruebas_respuestas,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ct_trivia_responses WHERE is_correct = TRUE AND is_duplicate = FALSE AND user_id IN (SELECT user_id FROM ct_users WHERE agent_name = 'PRUEBAS')) AS pruebas_correctas,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ct_trivia_responses WHERE is_correct = FALSE AND is_duplicate = FALSE AND is_out_of_time = FALSE AND user_id IN (SELECT user_id FROM ct_users WHERE agent_name = 'PRUEBAS')) AS pruebas_incorrectas,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ct_trivia_responses WHERE is_out_of_time = TRUE AND user_id IN (SELECT user_id FROM ct_users WHERE agent_name = 'PRUEBAS')) AS pruebas_fuera_de_tiempo

SELECT json_agg(t ORDER BY t.dia) AS data FROM (SELECT DATE(responded_at AT TIME ZONE 'America/Bogota') AS dia, COUNT(*) AS respuestas, SUM(CASE WHEN is_correct THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS correctas FROM ct_trivia_responses WHERE is_duplicate = FALSE GROUP BY dia) t

SELECT json_agg(t ORDER BY t.goles DESC) AS data FROM (SELECT u.agent_name, COUNT(DISTINCT u.user_id) AS participantes, COUNT(DISTINCT r.user_id) AS registrados, COALESCE(SUM(u.total_goals), 0) AS goles, COUNT(r.response_id) AS respuestas, COUNT(CASE WHEN r.is_correct THEN 1 END) AS correctas FROM ct_users u LEFT JOIN ct_trivia_responses r ON u.user_id = r.user_id AND r.is_duplicate = FALSE WHERE u.status = 'active' AND u.agent_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY u.agent_name) t

SELECT json_agg(t ORDER BY t.trivia_number) AS data FROM (SELECT t.trivia_number, COUNT(r.response_id) AS respuestas, COUNT(CASE WHEN r.is_correct THEN 1 END) AS correctas, COUNT(CASE WHEN r.is_out_of_time THEN 1 END) AS fuera_tiempo, AVG(CASE WHEN r.is_correct THEN r.response_seconds END) AS avg_segundos FROM ct_trivias t LEFT JOIN ct_trivia_responses r ON t.trivia_id = r.trivia_id AND r.is_duplicate = FALSE WHERE t.status IN ('sent','closed','settled') GROUP BY t.trivia_number) t

SELECT json_agg(t ORDER BY t.trivia_number, t.speed_range) AS data FROM (SELECT t.trivia_number, r.speed_range, COUNT(*) AS cantidad FROM ct_trivia_responses r JOIN ct_trivias t ON r.trivia_id = t.trivia_id WHERE r.is_correct = TRUE AND r.is_duplicate = FALSE AND r.speed_range > 0 GROUP BY t.trivia_number, r.speed_range) t

SELECT json_agg(t ORDER BY t.total_goals DESC, t.avg_speed_seconds ASC NULLS LAST) AS data FROM (SELECT user_id, rank_general, name, agent_name, total_goals, correct_count, total_responses, avg_speed_seconds FROM v_ct_rankings WHERE status = 'active' AND total_responses > 0) t
